story.title: COVID-19 Oral History with Alex Adams
story.description: The transcript features an interview with Alex Adams, the Administrator of the Idaho Division of Financial Management, conducted by HannaLore Hein, state historian for the Idaho State Historical Society. The discussion focuses on Adams' role and experiences during the COVID-19 pandemic, including his oversight of federal relief funds and the Coronavirus Financial Advisory Committee (CFAC). Topics include Idaho's swift adaptation to COVID-19 regulations, economic strategies to manage the crisis, the allocation of federal funds, and personal reflections on the pandemic's impact on Adams' life and career. The conversation highlights Idaho's fiscal policies and economic resilience during the pandemic.
